FROM

 (
 SELECT  ADJUSTMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL
 MINUS
 SELECT  ADJUSTMENT_ID,REFRESH_DATETIME FROM $$NRTACCUMDB.RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL
 ) ACM
 WHERE 
 ACM.ADJUSTMENT_ID = STG_RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL.ADJUSTMENT_ID AND ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_RAO_NGCCRM_RAE_ADJ_HDR_EDW_DTL.REFRESH_DATETIME
